title: PetSafe Automatic Ball Launcher Dog Toy – Tennis Ball Throwing Machine for Dogs – Indoor or Outside Play – Easy-Open Packaging
features: THROWS BALL FOR YOU: Sit back, relax and let your dog play fetch independently

SAFETY - A front motion sensor protects dogs and people standing in front of the launch area; please note that the security sensor only detects movement and will not detect a dog standing in front of the system

CUSTOMIZABLE SETTINGS - Ball thrown up to 9 meters when plugged in (less if using batteries), with 9 distance settings and 6 angle settings; this dog toy PetSafe comes with a 2-year manufacturer's warranty

VERSATILE - The launcher is water resistant, making it ideal for indoor and outdoor gaming (power cord or 6 quality D batteries (not included)); however, please note that the launcher is not waterproof
AUTOMATIC REST MODE - The 15-minute rest function prevents overwork and ensures safe play time for your dog; please read the manual before use
description: From the manufacturer PetSafe Automatic Ball Launcher The PetSafe Automatic Ball Launcher has been designed so that you can take a break when they need to, but so that your four legged friend can carry on playing. Uses standard size tennis balls Can be launched at six different angles and at nine distances – up to 9.1 metres Please read the manual before use and use good quality batteries This toy is intentionally made so that it is triggered when the dog moves in front of the sensor, otherwise it would continue shooting for no reason Do not use in rain and make sure there is no debris in the pocket of the launcher Make fetch games more fun with the Pet-safe Auto Ball Launcher.Resistant to water, it can be used to inside (power cord) and outside. outside (6 very good quality D batteries) for interactive play. Different settings for more fun: 9 distance settings, 6 ball angle settings, shoots standard size tennis balls (6.67 cm diam.) between 2 ,5 and 9 meters and up to an angle of 45 degrees. Features:Safetysensors;integrated,automatic sleepmode,motion detector upto 2m distance,beep sounds before a ball is thrown.IMPORTANT INFORMATION:Please note that some dogs may be sensitive to the sounds of the product.A little training in the sound of toy may then be necessary.PACKAGE CONTENTS:Automatic ball launcher,2 standard tennis balls,universal power cord and AC adapter,quick start guide A Company You Can Trust Global brand in pet products for nearly 30 years EU - Based experts available We help pets and their people live happy together! Benefits of the PetSafe Automatic Ball Launcher Keep Your Dog Active Promotes an active lifestyle so your dog gets the daily exercise he needs Protect Your Dog Protect your dog and his surroundings with multiple electronic motion sensors for up to 2 metres in front of the launch area Personalise Settings Customise the distance and angle settings so your dog can play fetch exactly how he likes Two Power Options Use the power cord while playing indoors or use 6 D-Cell batteries (not included) during outdoor play 4 Easy Steps to Play 1. Introduce Let your dog become comfortable with the launcher while it's powered off. Then, allow him to get used to the sound before adding a ball 2. Drop Train your dog to drop the ball into the Automatic Ball Launcher so he can have playtime anytime 3. Fetch No more tired arms. Once the ball is dropped, the Automatic Ball Launcher does all the work! 4. Pause A 15-minute play timer adds a rest break so your dog doesn't play past the point of exhaustion View Product View Product View Product View Product View Product Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 3.5 out of 5 stars 379 3.9 out of 5 stars 6,351 4.2 out of 5 stars 389 3.5 out of 5 stars 379 3.7 out of 5 stars 299 Price £42.99 £ 42 . 99 £146.87 £ 146 . 87 £81.20 £ 81 . 20 £32.49 £ 32 . 49 £202.94 £ 202 . 94 More PetSafe Solutions for You and Your Pet The PetSafe Ricochet Electronic Dog Toy features 2 paired toys that will have your dog bouncing back and forth as he tries to catch a "moving" squeak sound Control your pet's meal time from anywhere using your smartphone; app requires an apple iPhone or iPod device iOS 9.0 or later or a compatible Android smartphone 6.0 or later This 2L dual stream fountain is perfect for cats and small-medium sizes dogs, the ceramic design is easy to clean & looks great in the home This interactive dog toy rolls around in a random path on the floor, dispensing treats as it goes. The Kibble Chase is also a great slow feeder for dogs that eat too quickly The PetSafe SmartDoor only unlocks once a unique collar key has been detected, stopping unwanted animals and strays from getting into your home
